name: profile-settings
summary: Profile (view/edit, wired to the profiles table) + a local settings store + screens. Key-free.
postInstall: Requires the Supabase auth + profiles table from Phase 2.
Apply supabase/0010_profile_extras.sql (adds avatar_url + bio) → `supabase db reset`.
Pair with the skeleton's existing /account screen (sign out + delete account).
Avatars: add a private Supabase Storage bucket + signed URLs, store the URL in profiles.avatar_url.
Replace the screens in src/features/profile/ui/ after the Claude Design pass.
